name: Agent Panel
summary: Chat panel for interacting with AI agents. Displays message history with rich rendering, provides rich text input, shows agent context header, and handles confirm dialogs for destructive operations.
goals: Display agent conversation history with MessageRenderer
Provide chat input via RichTextInput with image and slash command support
Show agent context header with model and session info
Handle confirmation dialogs for potentially destructive agent actions

acceptanceCriteria.then: message history is displayed and the input is ready for new messages
the message is sent to the agent and the response streams in

acceptanceCriteria.given: An agent requests a destructive action
acceptanceCriteria.then: a confirm dialog appears before proceeding

unit-test.given: Agent panel is open with no active session
unit-test.then: a placeholder or empty state is shown

end-to-end.when: user opens the agent panel and sends a message
end-to-end.then: the full chat flow works: input → send → stream → render

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
